title: Iran still 'reviewing' US MoU proposal — 'We don't pay attention to deadlines'; Ghalibaf mocks 'Operation Trust Me Bro failed'
snippet: Iran FM spokesperson Baqaei says Tehran still reviewing US proposal: "the investigation into the exchanged texts is ongoing." Says "we do our own work, we don't pay attention to deadlines or timing." Ghalibaf mocks Axios MoU report: "Operation Trust Me Bro failed." Lawmaker Rezaei calls US text "more of an American wish list than a reality."
tag_reason: New statements from Baqaei/Ghalibaf/Rezaei specifically rejecting MoU progress narrative
